articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: 4 years into Russia’s full-scale invasion of Ukraine, a look at the war by the numbers - AP News
articles.description: Russia’s invasion of Ukraine four years ago launched Europe’s biggest conflict since World War II. It has caused immense suffering for civilians and harrowing ordeals for soldiers while rewriting the post-Cold War security order. The fighting enters its fifth…
